name: load_and_stress_test
description: k6 load, smoke, stress, soak and spike tests for Circuly Unified Customer API (2026-04)

scripts.all:smoke:cloud: dotenv -- k6 cloud run -e K6_CLOUD_NAME='All Modules Smoke' tests/smoke/all-modules.smoke.test.js
scripts.all:load:cloud: dotenv -- k6 cloud run -e K6_CLOUD_NAME='All Modules Load' tests/load/all-modules.load.test.js
scripts.all:stress:cloud: dotenv -- k6 cloud run -e K6_CLOUD_NAME='All Modules Stress' tests/stress/all-modules.stress.test.js
scripts.all:soak:cloud: dotenv -- k6 cloud run -e K6_CLOUD_NAME='All Modules Soak' tests/soak/soak.test.js
scripts.all:spike:cloud: dotenv -- k6 cloud run -e K6_CLOUD_NAME='All Modules Spike' tests/spike/spike.test.js
scripts.orders:load:cloud: dotenv -- k6 cloud run -e K6_CLOUD_NAME='Orders Load' tests/load/orders.load.test.js
scripts.subscriptions:load:cloud: dotenv -- k6 cloud run -e K6_CLOUD_NAME='Subscriptions Load' tests/load/subscriptions.load.test.js
scripts.customers:load:cloud: dotenv -- k6 cloud run -e K6_CLOUD_NAME='Customers Load' tests/load/customers.load.test.js
scripts.invoices:load:cloud: dotenv -- k6 cloud run -e K6_CLOUD_NAME='Invoices Load' tests/load/invoices.load.test.js
scripts.transactions:load:cloud: dotenv -- k6 cloud run -e K6_CLOUD_NAME='Transactions Load' tests/load/transactions.load.test.js
scripts.draft-orders:load:cloud: dotenv -- k6 cloud run -e K6_CLOUD_NAME='Draft Orders Load' tests/load/draft-orders.load.test.js
scripts.recurring-payments:load:cloud: dotenv -- k6 cloud run -e K6_CLOUD_NAME='Recurring Payments Load' tests/load/recurring-payments.load.test.js
scripts.products:load:cloud: dotenv -- k6 cloud run -e K6_CLOUD_NAME='Products Load' tests/load/products.load.test.js
scripts.retailers:load:cloud: dotenv -- k6 cloud run -e K6_CLOUD_NAME='Retailers Load' tests/load/retailers.load.test.js
scripts.vouchers:load:cloud: dotenv -- k6 cloud run -e K6_CLOUD_NAME='Vouchers Load' tests/load/vouchers.load.test.js
